nasb.text: “There will be signs in sun and moon and stars, and on the earth dismay among nations, in perplexity at the roaring of the sea and the waves,

esv.text: “And     there will be signs in sun and moon     and stars, and on the earth     distress of nations in perplexity because of the roaring of the sea and the waves,

cnv.text: “日月星辰將有異兆；在地上，各國也要因著海洋波濤的咆哮而困苦不安。

ccb.text: “日月星辰必显出异兆，怒海汹涌、波涛翻腾，令各国惊恐不安。

csbs.text: “在太阳、月亮和星辰中将有征兆出现    ；在地上，因海洋的咆哮和翻腾，列国的人就惊慌失措，陷入困惑混乱之中；
